title: GMS Week 11 - CAUTION URGED!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 21/03/2022
Image reference: 2022-03-21_gms-week-11-caution-urged_img1.jpg
There is talk this week that markets may well have peaked as Bangladesh, India and even Turkey suffered some falls from some of the record steel plate prices seen recently. Cooking oil and commodity prices are chiefly to blame for this dip, but it also cannot be expected that the markets will continually go up (as they have been doing for nearly the last two years). The unfolding crisis in Ukraine certainly has affected global oil and gas prices and those countries that regularly purchase their reserves from Russia (such as India) are now having to hammer out new plans to sustain their local economies, especially given the bevy of sanctions currently in place.
